name: The Killer Pass: Season 1
short_description: The Killer Pass: Season 1 - a tactical soccer game where your decisions lead to victory. Lead Prakaidao through intense matches, position players strategically, and outsmart opponents. From swift counterattacks to breaking defenses, prove yourself as the ultimate playmaker!
detailed_description:
The Killer Pass: Season 1 is a strategic turn-based soccer game based on the popular Thai comic series. Take control of Prakaidao FC as they compete in the youth league championship, facing fierce rivals from the original comic storyline.

Lead your team to victory through tactical turn-based gameplay where every decision counts. Choose your formations, make substitutions, and execute strategic plays as you progress through the story campaign.

Key Features:

  • Experience the story from the beloved Thai comic series "The Killer Pass"

  • Deep tactical gameplay with turn-based decision making

  • Freedom to manage your team lineup and formations

  • Versus mode letting you control any team in head-to-head matches

  • Authentic 2D art style bringing the comic characters to life

Can you guide Prakaidao FC to become the champions of the youth league?
